landing.subtitle: OfferMaster is more than a resume editor; it's your ultimate external brain for job hunting. From precise job matching and AI-driven resume rewrites to realistic voice mock interviews and personalized learning paths, we elevate your competitiveness all in one place.
landing.secondaryCta: Already have an account? Log in
landing.mockAssistantMessage: I analyzed your resume and found that your work experience needs more measurable outcomes.
landing.mockUserMessage: Help me improve the backend developer experience section
landing.mockResultPrefix: Rewrote "participated in system optimization" as "reduced API response time by

radar.title: Precision Job Radar
radar.desc: We map your foundational skills to scan the web for the perfect job fit, giving you a quantified match score.

agent.title: Resume Agent
agent.desc: Just type a single prompt. Our agent extracts your project experience and injects targeted highlights directly into your resume based on the target JD.

interview.title: Immersive Voice Interviews
interview.desc: Experience tailored interviews with an AI that mimics real recruiters based on the JD, supporting real-time voice, interruptions, and follow-ups.

learning.title: Targeted Learning Paths
learning.desc: Struggling with questions or lacking specific skills? We automatically generate a gap-filling plan and practical guides for you.

upload.title: Upload resume
upload.desc: Supports PDF, Word, and TXT. AI parses your resume into structured content.

optimize.title: Chat to optimize
optimize.desc: Share your target company and role, then improve each experience with AI.

export.title: Export and apply
export.desc: Export a polished PDF and use it directly for applications.

landing.insightTitle: More than editing,<break></break>it helps you think

insights.diff: Preview every diff and accept changes one by one
insights.report: Use interview reports to find weak spots and next drills
